CustomField.description: This field shows the total cash paid out from the Security Deposit. It is automatically calculated by summing all approved and disbursed payable amounts, updating whenever a new cash payout occurs. [LOAD: No] [JUSTIFICATION: No needs to do load, because this field automatically populates after Payout creation.] [REPLACEMENT OBJECT API: NA] [REPLACEMENT FIELD API: NA] [COMMENTS: NA]
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Total amount refunded through cash payouts. System calculated.
CustomField.label: Paid Out Via Cash
